_readme.prefix: The bot command prefix. Default is +
_readme.verification_enabled: Enable or disable the entire verification system.
_readme.captcha_enabled: Enable or disable the Google reCAPTCHA step during verification.
_readme.logs_enabled: Enable or disable logging to the Logs webhook.
_readme.NotVerified_Role: Role ID assigned to members who have not yet verified.
_readme.Verified_Role: Role ID assigned to members after successful verification.
_readme.admin_role: List of role IDs granted full administrative access, including the /settings web panel.
_readme.moderator_role: List of role IDs granted access to moderation commands such as /verify, /docs, and +SendPanel.
_readme.temp_de_vie_du_lien: Verification link lifetime, in minutes, before it expires and must be regenerated.
_readme.Allow_Vpn_Proxy: If true, users connecting via VPN or proxy are allowed to verify. Default: false.
_readme.Allow_Alt: If true, users flagged as alternate accounts are allowed to verify. Default: false.
_readme.Allow_Ip_Already_Linked: If true, an IP address already linked to another account is allowed to verify. Default: false.
_readme.Enable: If false, all roles (verified and unverified) are stripped from every member and the system is disabled.
_readme.Discord_Server_Link: Discord invite link shown when clicking the Discord logo on the verification page.
_readme.Discord_Channel_Link: Discord channel link used for post-verification redirect.
_readme.Success_Verify_Webhook: Discord webhook URL called when a user successfully verifies.
_readme.Error_Verify_Webhook: Discord webhook URL called when a verification attempt is blocked or fails.
_readme.Logs: Discord webhook URL used for general command and moderation logs.
_readme.note_secrets: The bot token and reCAPTCHA keys must be in key.env only. Webhook URLs and role IDs belong in this file.
